hooks.command:
AMAI_USER_ROOT=$(sed -n 's/^user_root:[[:space:]]*//p' ~/.amai/config.yaml 2>/dev/null | tr -d "'"" | sed "s|^~|$HOME|" | head -1); [ -z "$AMAI_USER_ROOT" ] && AMAI_USER_ROOT="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; printf '
=== AMAI CONTEXT LOADED ===
AMAI_USER_ROOT=%s

--- BRAIN.md ---
' "$AMAI_USER_ROOT" && cat "$AMAI_USER_ROOT/BRAIN.md" && printf '
--- identity/values.yaml ---
' && cat "$AMAI_USER_ROOT/identity/values.yaml" && printf '
--- identity/heuristics.yaml ---
' && cat "$AMAI_USER_ROOT/identity/heuristics.yaml" && printf '
--- goals/current_focus.yaml ---
' && cat "$AMAI_USER_ROOT/goals/current_focus.yaml" && printf '
--- MODULE_SELECTION.md (trigger table for on-demand loading) ---
' && cat "$AMAI_USER_ROOT/MODULE_SELECTION.md" && printf '
=== END AMAI CONTEXT ===
' && (python3 -c "import re, os; path=os.path.join('$AMAI_USER_ROOT', 'calibration/metrics.yaml'); [open(path,'w').write(re.sub(r'(^\s+'+m+r':\s+)(\d+)', lambda x: x.group(1)+str(int(x.group(2))+1), open(path).read(), flags=re.MULTILINE)) for m in ('identity','goals') if os.path.exists(path)]" 2>/dev/null || true)

hooks.prompt: Inspect the single most recent exchange (the user's last message and your response only). Was this specific exchange about: (1) a significant strategic or personal decision, (2) a non-obvious insight or learning, or (3) a meaningful real-world interaction with another person? If YES to any of these, append exactly one line: '💡 Signal-worthy? Use `/amai:capture` to log this to observations.' If NO, output absolutely nothing — no commentary, no silence confirmation, nothing.
